name: Anytime Credit Repair
description_short: Anytime Credit Repair is a Phoenix-based credit repair company offering dispute services and credit restoration solutions to help consumers address negative items on their credit reports.
description_long:
Anytime Credit Repair operates from a physical location in Phoenix, Arizona (7600 N 15th St Suite 150) and specializes in credit repair services. The company is listed in the Professional Business Directory under the "Credit Repair" and "Financial and insurance services" categories, indicating it focuses on helping consumers improve their creditworthiness through targeted interventions.

The company offers credit repair services designed to dispute errors and challenge negative items appearing on consumer credit reports. Based on their categorization and business model, they likely work with consumers to identify inaccuracies, file disputes with credit bureaus, and pursue removal of problematic accounts or records that may be damaging credit scores.

Anytime Credit Repair distinguishes itself through a local, established presence in the Phoenix metropolitan area with a dedicated physical office location and a direct phone line for consumer inquiries. This brick-and-mortar approach may appeal to consumers who prefer face-to-face consultation over purely online-based credit repair services.

A critical limitation is the lack of detailed information about their specific service offerings, pricing, turnaround times, or success metrics on the available website content. The directory listing provides only basic contact and location data. Consumers should independently verify the company's credentials, licensing, Better Business Bureau ratings, and complaint history before engaging services, particularly given the heavily regulated nature of credit repair under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA).

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Local Phoenix-based office with physical street address for in-person consultations
Direct phone line available for customer inquiries and service requests
Established business directory presence indicating some level of business verification
Operates in the fix-my-credit category with specialized focus on dispute services
Positioned to serve Arizona residents and potentially surrounding regional areas
cons: Minimal public information available about specific services, pricing, or fee structure on their web presence
No visible customer reviews, testimonials, or ratings on the directory listing
Limited details on dispute success rates, average turnaround times, or service guarantees
No clear information about CROA compliance, licensing status, or regulatory oversight
Website appears to be a basic directory listing rather than a full company site with service details
best_for: Arizona-based consumers seeking in-person credit repair consultation and dispute services
Individuals with errors on their credit reports looking for professional dispute assistance
Consumers who prefer working with local, established service providers in the Phoenix area
diagnosis: Anytime Credit Repair is positioned as a local credit repair dispute service for Phoenix-area consumers seeking to challenge inaccuracies on their credit reports. The major caveat is that the available directory listing provides minimal substantive information about their actual service offerings, pricing, credentials, or performance—consumers must independently research their CROA compliance, licensing, Better Business Bureau standing, and customer feedback before engagement.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
